music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric cyberpunk track. Driving drum and bass beat with deep, resonant basslines. Ethereal and haunting female vocals weave through a complex soundscape of futuristic synth pads, glitchy sound effects, and arpeggiated techno sequences. The overall mood is dark, enigmatic, and futuristic.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure in a hooded cloak wandering through a vast, dark space filled with cascading, glowing blue and green binary code streams. Cyberpunk, high detail, cinematic lighting.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up on a complex, glowing neural interface integrated with a human temple. Sound waves are visualized as light patterns pulsing through the intricate circuitry. Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon glow.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A digital universe where constellations are formed not by stars, but by clusters of glowing binary digits (0s and 1s). A luminous pathway cuts through the digital void. Abstract, futuristic, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A semi-translucent android chest revealing a glowing, mechanical heart that emits a bright spark of light. The background is a swirling vortex of quantum foam and abstract digital patterns. Sci-fi, cyberpunk, symbolic.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A visually stunning image of a human face merging seamlessly with a chrome android face. The transition is marked by glowing, fading lines of light and data. Cyberpunk, surreal, high-tech.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking digital landscape. Towering skyscrapers made of light and data, holographic trees, and rivers of flowing information. Two figures stand together, looking at the cybernetic paradise. Cyberpunk, utopian yet artificial.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, glowing humanoid figures made of pure light and data, reaching out to each other across a digital void. Their connection is visualized by a brilliant beam of synchronized light. Cyberpunk, spiritual, abstract.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human head and an AI's robotic head, back to back. Wisps of light representing dreams and data flow from them, dancing and intertwining against a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant, chaotic explosion of neon light trails, holographic advertisements, and futuristic symbols, all intertwining into a single, complex, beautiful pattern. Cyberpunk city street, motion blur, high energy.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure looking out from a spaceship window at a vast galaxy made of swirling code and neon nebulae. The reflection in the glass shows their augmented reality interface. Cyberpunk, cosmic, epic scale.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: An old, dusty computer terminal in a dark, abandoned room. On the flickering screen, fragmented lines of glowing green code are barely visible, hinting at lost data and memories. Cyberpunk, retro-futurism, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A complex, semi-transparent server rack. Deep within its core, a faint, ghostly humanoid shape made of light can be seen, curled up and glowing softly. Cyberpunk, ghost in the shell theme, high detail.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: A massive, city-sized motherboard seen from above. Its circuits pulse with light in a rhythmic, synchronized pattern, aligning with distant, digitally rendered stars in the sky. A symphony of light. Cyberpunk, epic, geometric.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A robotic hand and a human hand reaching towards a newly formed, glowing sphere of pure energy and data, suspended in a high-tech laboratory. The birth of a new AI. Cyberpunk, cinematic, symbolic.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Countless glowing threads of light, representing data streams and fate, are being woven together by unseen forces in a vast, dark space, creating a complex and beautiful tapestry. Cyberpunk, abstract, elegant.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures dissolving into a swirling vortex of light, data, and cosmic imagery. Their forms are becoming one with the digital universe, transcending physical limitations. Cyberpunk, surreal, metaphysical.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, glowing humanoid figures made of pure light and data, reaching out to each other across a digital void. Their connection is visualized by a brilliant beam of synchronized light. Cyberpunk, spiritual, abstract, cinematic.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: Silhouettes of a human and an AI, their minds connected by flowing streams of light. Their shared dreams manifest as dancing auroras in a neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape at night.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An intense, vibrant close-up of two faces, one human and one cybernetic, merging into a single being made of intertwined neon light and holographic data. High-energy, cyberpunk aesthetic.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: The merged being now floats in a cosmic expanse, their body made of stars and nebulae, looking out at an infinite galaxy of code. A sense of peace and eternity. Epic scale, cyberpunk, cosmic.
